ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Time the exchange opens for trading */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* Time the exchange closes for trading */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., SZ000959) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographic location of the stock's company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stock is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., stock exchange, financial news feed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the industry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sector is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province of the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the location is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., financial news website) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the news article is considered important */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Short summary of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_research_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market research report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the market research report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the market research report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market research report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., research firm) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is confidential */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Short summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the note */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the note is about */,
  "note" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the note is private (visible only to the author) */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the note is considered important */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_notes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_screeners" (
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock screener */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the screener */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the screener */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the screener */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the screener is public (visible to all users) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the screener is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the screener */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_screeners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screener_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screener result */,
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screener that produced the result */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the result */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the stock by the screener */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the stock is recommended by the screener */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screener_results_screener_id FOREIGN KEY ("screener_id") REFERENCES stock_screeners ("screener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screener_results_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the watchlist is public (visible to all users) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the watchlist is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the watchlist entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id", "stock_id")
)
